title: Open Metaverse Hackathon
description: Build the future before Big Tech does. 27-hour hackathon across Tools, Places, and AI tracks.

title: Spatial Fabric Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering fabric architecture, campus attachment, and scene assembly.

title: 3D Model Optimization Clinic
description: Learn best practices for GLB models: triangle budgets, texture limits, and streaming-friendly design.

title: MSF Developer Meetup
description: Monthly meetup for metaverse developers. Demos, lightning talks, and networking.

title: MVMF Plugin Development Deep Dive
description: Advanced session on building MVMF plugins: services, sources, models, and the factory pattern.

title: Metaverse Standards Forum Plenary
description: Quarterly plenary session of the Metaverse Standards Forum. Open to all members.
